message:
fix(fuzz): closure-wrap CString::as_ptr in fuzz_errno_precedence (bd-5cv2p)

Four callsites used `CString::as_ptr` as a function-pointer style in
`Option::map_or`. `as_ptr` is a method (takes &self) so the bare
identifier doesn't satisfy the FnOnce(&CString) -> *const c_char
shape rustc wants — E0599 with a hint to use `as_c_str`. Closure-wrap
each: `|s| s.as_ptr()`.

Verified: cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_errno_precedence -- 30s →
251,275 runs, no crashes.
